hero.headline: The sea, wherever you take it.
hero.sub: A premium inflatable yacht engineered from drop-stitch armour and double-layer PVC. Inflate it with a pump in minutes, fold it into your car — no marina, no trailer, no limits.

manifesto.title: We don't build boats. We build freedom you can carry.
manifesto.lead: No marina. No trailer. No winter storage bills. Just a rigid-feeling, drop-stitch hull that packs into your car and unfolds wherever the water is. This is boating, finally set free.

fleet.title: Three platforms. One promise: pack it, pump it, go.

how.title: From the boot of your car to the open water — in minutes.

inflate.label: Inflate
inflate.title: Inflate
inflate.body: Unroll it, connect the high-pressure pump, and watch a soft bag become a rigid yacht. A few minutes, no tools.

castoff.label: Cast off
castoff.title: Cast off
castoff.body: On the water it behaves like a hard hull: stable, quiet, confident. Add the silent electric drive, or your own outboard.

pack.label: Pack away
pack.title: Pack away
pack.body: Deflate, roll into the carry bags, and it rides home in your car. No marina, no trailer, store it in a closet.

craft.title: Armour that floats.
points: A Fusion drop-stitch core — thousands of threads that lock the hull rigid once it reaches working pressure.
Double-layer PVC, 0.5 + 0.9 mm [[PLACEHOLDER]] — engineered to shrug off punctures, sun and salt.
UV- and water-resistant upholstery (Silvertex-style) that stays soft season after season.
Aluminium and stainless-steel fittings chosen to resist corrosion, everywhere it counts.
CE certification [[PLACEHOLDER]] — built to standard, refined far beyond it.

testimonials.title: The people who already cast off.

items.quote: We packed the whole boat into the estate car and had it floating on the lake in twenty minutes. Stable, quiet, not a drop of fuel.
items.author: [[PLACEHOLDER — owner name]]

items.quote: No marina, no trailer, no winter bills. We just drive to the water, pump it up and the day begins.
items.author: [[PLACEHOLDER — owner name]]

items.quote: On the water it feels like a hard hull — you forget it folds into two bags. The silence is the part I didn't expect.
items.author: [[PLACEHOLDER — owner name]]

contact.title: Tell us the story you want to live.
contact.lead: No pressure, no sales pitch — just a conversation about which platform fits your water.

form.name: Your name
form.message: Tell us a little about the story you have in mind
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about my enquiry and have read the privacy policy.
form.success: Thank you. Your message is on its way — we'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: The sea, wherever you take it.

banner.text: We use cookies to understand how the site is used and to improve your experience. Non-essential cookies stay off until you accept them.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.descNecessary: Required for the site to function. These cannot be switched off and store no personal data beyond what is essential.
modal.descAnalytics: Help us understand how visitors use the site, so we can improve the experience. Off by default.
modal.descMarketing: Used to make any future advertising more relevant. Off by default.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how [[COMPANY_NAME]] processes personal data collected through this website, in accordance with the GDPR.
privacy.controllerBody: The controller of your personal data is [[COMPANY_NAME]], [[COMPANY_ADDRESS]], [[COMPANY_TAX_ID]]. Contact: [[COMPANY_EMAIL]].
privacy.dataBody: When you use the contact form we process the name, email address and message content you provide. We also process anonymous usage data only if you consent to analytics cookies.
privacy.purposeBody: To respond to your enquiry (legitimate interest / steps prior to a contract) and, with consent, to measure and improve the website.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict and port your data, and to object to processing. To exercise these rights contact [[COMPANY_EMAIL]]. You may also lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority [[SUPERVISORY_AUTHORITY]].
privacy.retentionBody: Enquiry data is kept only as long as needed to handle your request and any resulting relationship, then deleted. [[PLACEHOLDER — retention period]]

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy describes the cookies and similar technologies used on this website operated by [[COMPANY_NAME]].
cookies.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We use them to keep the site working and, with your consent, to understand usage.
cookies.necessaryBody: Always active. Store your cookie consent choice and keep the site functioning. [[PLACEHOLDER — list of necessary cookies]]
cookies.analyticsBody: Off by default. With consent, Google Analytics 4 helps us measure traffic and improve the site. [[PLACEHOLDER — list of analytics cookies]]
cookies.marketingBody: Off by default. Reserved for any future advertising measurement. [[PLACEHOLDER — list of marketing cookies]]
cookies.manageBody: You can change or withdraw your consent at any time via the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.

festa.label: The stage platform
festa.tagline: Where the day turns into a celebration.
festa.story: The big-day platform for friends and family. Inflate a wide, rigid sun-deck with an integrated slide, daybeds and swim ladder — then spend the afternoon swimming, lounging and celebrating. Pack it into the car when the light goes.
festa.idealFor: Days with friends · family swims · floating celebrations · sun-deck lounging.

aurora.label: Go anywhere
aurora.tagline: The boat that goes where roads end.
aurora.story: The most compact, lightest-to-carry platform in the fleet. It fits in the boot, inflates in minutes and launches from any shore — lakes, hidden coves, places with no slipway. Where roads end, Aurora begins.
aurora.idealFor: Lakes and hidden coves · launching without a slipway · solo and two-up adventures · travelling light.

serenite.label: A refuge on the water
serenite.story: The relaxation configuration: quilted daybeds, a silent electric drive and nothing but water around you. Anchor in a quiet cove, switch everything off, and let the platform become the calmest room you own — then fold it away.
serenite.idealFor: Rest and stillness · romantic evenings · silent electric cruising · wellness on the water.

yachtsCommon.specsNote: Figures are indicative and may vary by configuration.

alt.heroMain: A premium inflatable drop-stitch yacht gliding across calm open water at golden hour
alt.heroOverhead: Aerial view of the inflatable platform anchored over crystal-clear turquoise water
alt.atmosphereDawn: A tranquil seascape at first light with the inflatable yacht as a distant silhouette
alt.stepInflate: A person connecting a high-pressure electric pump to the half-inflated drop-stitch platform on the shore
alt.stepCastoff: The fully inflated yacht leaving the shallows onto open water as a person steps aboard
alt.stepPack: The deflated platform rolled into two carry bags and loaded into the boot of a car
alt.materialMacro: Macro cross-section of high-pressure drop-stitch fabric between two layers of coated PVC
alt.valvePump: Close-up of the high-pressure inflation valve and electric pump on the matte-white hull
alt.deckDetail: Detail of the faux-teak deck meeting quilted grey marine upholstery and a stainless D-ring
alt.modelFesta: MARÉ Festa — the large inflatable party platform with an integrated slide on turquoise water
alt.modelAurora: MARÉ Aurora — the compact, easy-to-carry inflatable boat on a calm mountain lake
alt.modelSerenite: MARÉ Sérénité — the relaxation platform with quilted daybeds anchored in a quiet cove
alt.friendsSunset: Friends relaxing and celebrating on the inflatable platform on calm water at sunset
alt.familySlide: A family on the inflatable yacht, a child sliding off the integrated slide into the sea
alt.coupleRelax: A couple reclining on the quilted daybeds of the platform in a quiet cove at dawn
alt.swimLadder: A swimmer climbing the stainless boarding ladder back onto the faux-teak swim platform
alt.sideProfile: Clean side profile of the whole inflatable yacht floating on calm teal water
alt.bowDetail: Close shot of the bow, oval window cut-out and grey grab-handles on the drop-stitch hull

home.title: MARÉ — Inflatable portable yachts you can carry anywhere
home.description: MARÉ builds premium inflatable yachts from drop-stitch and double-layer PVC. Pump them up in minutes, fold them into your car — a portable boat with no marina and no trailer.
